text:
Sword of Truth (, Shinjitsu no Tsurugi) is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and is required for a player to complete the game.
__NOTOC__

| colspan="3" align="center" |Splits in two anything and anyone deceitful. In trials, it's a criminal's worst nightmare. The sword will shatter when used to cut something true, but will regenerate if stored in its scabbard for one day.
|

!How to Obtain:
| colspan="3" align="center" |This card can be won in the monthly Rock-Paper-Scissors match held in the city of Antokiba.
|

Summary

Sword of Truth - This card allows the caster to summon forth a Sword of Truth. It grants the wielder the ability to split anything or anyone being deceitful in half. When used for law and order, this sword is a criminal's worst nightmare. If the accused is guilty, then the sword will cut them in half, killing them (in most cases). When used against someone innocent, the sword will shatter. It will then regenerate for further use if kept in its scabbard for a whole day.

Card Description

{| class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0"
![Jap]
|No.083 :: 
偽りのものを一刀両断にする剣。裁判ににも使われ、犯罪者をふるえあがらせた。真実を切ると刃がくだけちるが、鞘におさめておくと１日で再生する。
|-
![Eng]
|No.083 :: Sword of Truth 
The sword cuts things into two pieces that lie. It is also used in trials against criminals. The blade shatters if it is not a lie, but will be repaired in a day when in its sheath.
|}

Trivia

This is Killua's first collected card in the game. It was stolen afterwards by someone in a group of Greed Island players that confronted Gon and Killua with the intent of stealing the card.
